system.name: Spectre
system.summary: Ecosystem manifest for @phcdevworks/spectre-components — Lit-based web components.

build.title: Build
build.description: Composition and application-facing packages built on the foundation.

@phcdevworks/spectre-components.description: Lit-based web component layer of the Spectre system — reusable, accessible, framework-agnostic components.
notes: Layer 2 (build) of the Spectre system. Requires spectre-tokens CSS variables loaded in the consuming page.
Import individual components via sub-path exports — never from internal paths.
Run npm run check before staging any commit.

@phcdevworks/spectre-tokens.description: Design-token source for the Spectre system.

@phcdevworks/spectre-ui.description: Layer 2 styling contract between spectre-tokens and downstream adapters.

boundaryConstraints.rule: Expose component APIs only through declared package exports.
boundaryConstraints.reason: Prevents tight internal coupling across packages.

generationRules: Import components via declared sub-path exports only — never from internal paths.
Run npm run check before staging any commit.
usageGuidance: Import individual components via their sub-path exports (e.g. @phcdevworks/spectre-components/button).
Components require spectre-tokens CSS variables to be loaded in the consuming page.
safeDefaults: Do not depend on higher-layer Spectre packages.
Do not expose internal component implementation details as public exports.
